method.trump_tone_index: Daily mean LLM tone score on all authored text posts. Higher values are more positive or triumphant; lower values are more hostile or alarmist.
method.trump_geopolitical_index: Daily mean LLM geopolitical score on authored posts that the model classifies as cross-border, trade, war, alliance, migration, or other geopolitical content.
method.trump_shock_index: Daily composite z-score combining posting volume, tone intensity, rhetorical heat, uppercase usage, exclamation intensity, and reblog density.
method.tone_index_llm: Legacy platform-standardized tone series kept for compatibility.
method.geopolitical_index_llm: Legacy platform-standardized geopolitical series kept for compatibility.

note: Days with no posts are set to 0. If scoring coverage is partial, daily indices reflect only the posts already labeled by the current model and pipeline version.
